metadata.description: BitSight Risk Findings CCF connection template. Creates the custom table, DCE, DCR, and one RestApiPoller connection per monitored risk vector for a single BitSight company.
Existing Log Analytics workspace name. Deploy this template to the workspace resource group.
Deployment location. Use the same region as the Log Analytics workspace.
Microsoft Sentinel data connector definition resource name.
BitSight company GUID to monitor. This reduced-scope CCF package deploys one company per Connect action.
Display name used in the output table for the monitored company.
Incremental polling window in minutes. Default is 7 days.
Delay applied to the query window in minutes.

variables.transformKql: [concat('source', uriComponentToString('%0A'),'| extend _details=details, _assets=assets, _tags=tags', uriComponentToString('%0A'),'| extend _risk_category=iif(isnotempty(tostring(_details.risk_category)), tostring(_details.risk_category), tostring(risk_category))', uriComponentToString('%0A'),'| extend _risk_vector=iif(isnotempty(tostring(_details.risk_vector)), tostring(_details.risk_vector), tostring(risk_vector))', uriComponentToString('%0A'),'| extend _risk_vector_label=iif(isnotempty(tostring(_details.risk_vector_label)), tostring(_details.risk_vector_label), iif(isnotempty(tostring(risk_vector_label)), tostring(risk_vector_label), _risk_vector))', uriComponentToString('%0A'),'| extend _grade=tolower(iif(isnotempty(tostring(_details.grade)), tostring(_details.grade), tostring(grade)))', uriComponentToString('%0A'),'| extend _severity=iif(isnotnull(_details.severity), todouble(_details.severity), todouble(severity))', uriComponentToString('%0A'),'| extend _severity_category=tolower(iif(isnotempty(tostring(_details.severity_category)), tostring(_details.severity_category), tostring(severity_category)))', uriComponentToString('%0A'),'| extend normalized_risk_state=case(_grade in (''good'',''fair'',''warn'',''bad'',''neutral''), _grade, _severity_category in (''severe'',''material''), ''bad'', _severity_category == ''moderate'', ''warn'', _severity_category == ''minor'', ''fair'', _severity >= 7.0, ''bad'', _severity >= 4.0, ''warn'', _severity >= 1.0, ''fair'', ''unknown'')', uriComponentToString('%0A'),'| where normalized_risk_state in (''warn'',''bad'')', uriComponentToString('%0A'),'| extend _stable_id=iif(isnotempty(tostring(_details.rolledup_observation_id)), tostring(_details.rolledup_observation_id), iif(isnotempty(tostring(_details.evidence_key)), tostring(_details.evidence_key), iif(isnotempty(tostring(temporary_id)), tostring(temporary_id), iif(isnotempty(tostring(guid)), tostring(guid), tostring(id)))))', uriComponentToString('%0A'),'| extend _first_seen=todatetime(iif(isnotempty(tostring(_details.first_seen)), tostring(_details.first_seen), tostring(first_seen)))', uriComponentToString('%0A'),'| extend _last_seen=todatetime(iif(isnotempty(tostring(_details.last_seen)), tostring(_details.last_seen), tostring(last_seen)))', uriComponentToString('%0A'),'| extend _duration=tostring(iif(isnotempty(tostring(_details.duration)), tostring(_details.duration), tostring(duration)))', uriComponentToString('%0A'),'| extend _evidence_key=tostring(iif(isnotempty(tostring(_details.evidence_key)), tostring(_details.evidence_key), tostring(evidence_key)))', uriComponentToString('%0A'),'| extend _rolledup_observation_id=tostring(iif(isnotempty(tostring(_details.rolledup_observation_id)), tostring(_details.rolledup_observation_id), tostring(rolledup_observation_id)))', uriComponentToString('%0A'),'| extend _impacts_risk_vector_details=tostring(iif(isnotempty(tostring(_details.impacts_risk_vector_details)), tostring(_details.impacts_risk_vector_details), tostring(impacts_risk_vector_details)))', uriComponentToString('%0A'),'| extend _remaining_decay=iif(isnotnull(_details.remaining_decay), todouble(_details.remaining_decay), todouble(remaining_decay))', uriComponentToString('%0A'),'| extend _remediated=iif(isnotnull(_details.remediated), tobool(_details.remediated), tobool(remediated))', uriComponentToString('%0A'),'| extend _comments=tostring(iif(isnotempty(tostring(_details.comments)), tostring(_details.comments), tostring(comments)))', uriComponentToString('%0A'),'| extend _tags_out=iif(isnotnull(_details.tags), _details.tags, _tags)', uriComponentToString('%0A'),'| extend _raw=pack(''temporary_id'', temporary_id, ''risk_category'', risk_category, ''risk_vector'', risk_vector, ''risk_vector_label'', risk_vector_label, ''grade'', grade, ''severity'', severity, ''severity_category'', severity_category, ''affects_rating'', affects_rating, ''first_seen'', first_seen, ''last_seen'', last_seen, ''duration'', duration, ''evidence_key'', evidence_key, ''rolledup_observation_id'', rolledup_observation_id, ''impacts_risk_vector_details'', impacts_risk_vector_details, ''remaining_decay'', remaining_decay, ''remediated'', remediated, ''comments'', comments, ''assets'', _assets, ''tags'', _tags, ''details'', _details, ''id'', id, ''guid'', guid)', uriComponentToString('%0A'),'| project TimeGenerated=todatetime(now()), company_guid=''', parameters('companyGuid'), ''', company_name=''', replace(parameters('companyName'), '''', ''''''), ''', finding_uid=iif(isempty(_stable_id), tostring(hash_sha256(strcat(tostring(temporary_id), ''|'', tostring(guid), ''|'', tostring(id), ''|'', _risk_vector, ''|'', tostring(_first_seen), ''|'', tostring(_last_seen)))), _stable_id), temporary_id=tostring(temporary_id), risk_category=_risk_category, risk_vector=_risk_vector, risk_vector_label=_risk_vector_label, finding_grade=_grade, severity=_severity, severity_category=_severity_category, normalized_risk_state=tostring(normalized_risk_state), affects_rating=tobool(affects_rating), first_seen=_first_seen, last_seen=_last_seen, duration=_duration, evidence_key=_evidence_key, rolledup_observation_id=_rolledup_observation_id, impacts_risk_vector_details=_impacts_risk_vector_details, remaining_decay=_remaining_decay, remediated=_remediated, comments=_comments, assets=_assets, tags=_tags_out, details=_details, raw=_raw')]

properties.description: DCE for BitSight risk findings CCF ingestion
